<!--
Template created by KittyTeggie under the Creative Commons Zero v1.0 (public domain) license.
https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates
-->
<table style="width:100%;border:1px solid black;padding-left:5px;{{#if: {{{background-color|}}}|background-color:{{{background-color|}}};|background-color:white;}}{{#if: {{{border-color|}}}|border-left:{{{border-color|}}};|border-left=10px solid black}}">
<tr>
<td {{#if:{{{imagewidth|}}}|width={{{imagewidth|}}}}}>
{{#if: {{{image|}}}|[[File:{{{image|}}}|{{#if:{{{imagewidth|}}}|{{{imagewidth|}}}}}|thumb|center|{{#if:{{{imagelink|}}}|link={{{imagelink|}}}}}]]}} 
</td>
<td>{{#if:{{{text|}}}|{{{text|}}}}}</td>
</tr></table><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude><!--
                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
    Documentation is avaidable at the MessageBox_doc.wiki file
    in this repository
    REMEMBER TO USE MessageBox/doc AS THE NAME OF THE TEMPLATE
    WITH THE DOCUMENTATION!!!
-->
